params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature card in your graveyard
params.SpellDescription: Create a token that's a copy of target creature card in your graveyard, except it's an artifact in addition to its other types, gains haste, and has "Whenever a player casts a spell or a creature attacks, exile this token." Activate only as a sorcery.

remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature card in your graveyard
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Create a token that's a copy of target creature card in your graveyard, except it's an artifact in addition to its other types, gains haste, and has "Whenever a player casts a spell or a creature attacks, exile this token." Activate only as a sorcery.
